texto: But for each high, there's a low. Periods of such despair and listlessness that you don't ever see a way of getting out of it. Everything's bad. Nothing's ever going to be all right again. There's no reason to get out of bed in the morning. You don't want to talk to anybody, and when you do you end up pissing them off. You can't remember what it's like to be happy.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a McFly: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “But for each high, there's a low. Periods of such despair and listlessness that you don't ever se…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que felicidade, depression, mcfly pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e termino.

frase_original: But for each high, there's a low. Periods of such despair and listlessness that you don't ever see a way of getting out of it. Everything's bad. Nothing's ever going to be all right again. There's no reason to get out of bed in the morning. You don't want to talk to anybody, and when you do you end up pissing them off. You can't remember what it's like to be happy.
